blocks.text: Hovland one shot off the summit — Hilton Head heats up
After two rounds Hovland sits T3 at -7, one shot behind Swede Ludvig Åberg. NRK called it a kanonstart — with two rounds left, the weekend could still belong to Norway.
Arsenal lead City by six points with six games left. A City win Sunday closes it to three — and the title race is alive again. The Etihad on Sunday is the match of the season.

blocks.label: Also this weekend
items: ⚽ Sat 21:00 — Copa del Rey: Atlético Madrid vs Real Sociedad
